/Applications/CLion.app/Contents/bin/cmake/mac/bin/cmake -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_MAKE_PROGRAM=/Applications/CLion.app/Contents/bin/ninja/mac/ninja -DCMAKE_TOOLCHAIN_FILE=/Users/aq_home/.vcpkg-clion/vcpkg/scripts/buildsystems/vcpkg.cmake -G Ninja -S /Users/aq_home/Downloads/JetbotParking -B /Users/aq_home/Downloads/JetbotParking/cmake-build-debug
-- Running vcpkg install
Detecting compiler hash for triplet arm64-osx...
All requested packages are currently installed.
Total install time: 334 ns
The package gtest is compatible with built-in CMake targets:

    enable_testing()
    
    find_package(GTest CONFIG REQUIRED)
    target_link_libraries(main PRIVATE GTest::gtest GTest::gtest_main GTest::gmock GTest::gmock_main)
    
    add_test(AllTestsInMain main)

The package opencv2 is compatible with CMake if you set the OpenCV_DIR *before* the find_package call

    set(OpenCV_DIR "${VCPKG_INSTALLED_DIR}/arm64-osx/share/opencv2")
    find_package(OpenCV REQUIRED)

-- Running vcpkg install - done
CMake Error at CMakeLists.txt:8 (vcpkg_cmake_configure):
  Unknown CMake command "vcpkg_cmake_configure".


-- Configuring incomplete, errors occurred!
